task_title: Insert and resize an image on the second slide

action_preconditions: Slide 2 is active in Impress and no dialog is open.

nl_position: the Insert menu in the top menu bar near the upper-left of the window

steps.action_before_state: The "Marketing Strategies" slide is visible in the main canvas, with the Properties sidebar open on the right.
action_after_effects: The Insert drop-down menu opens over the slide, showing options such as Image, Audio or Video, Chart, and Table.
steps.nl_explanation: Click the Insert menu to open commands for adding content to the slide.

action_preconditions: The Insert menu is open on slide 2.

nl_position: the "Image..." menu item near the top of the open Insert drop-down

steps.action_before_state: The Insert menu is expanded above the slide, and the first item in the list is "Image...".
action_after_effects: An "Insert Image" file picker dialog opens in front of Impress.
steps.nl_explanation: Click "Image..." to open the file picker for inserting an image.

action_preconditions: The "Insert Image" dialog is open on the Desktop folder, and `none.png` is selected in the file list.
steps.action_before_state: The modal file picker shows several image files, with `none.png` highlighted and the Open button available.
action_after_effects: The dialog closes and the selected striped image is inserted onto slide 2 as a large selected object.
steps.nl_explanation: Press Enter to confirm the selected file and place the image on the slide.

action_preconditions: The inserted image is selected on slide 2, and the Properties sidebar shows the Position and Size controls.

nl_position: the Height input box showing "13.55 cm" in the Position and Size section of the right Properties sidebar

steps.action_before_state: A large square striped image overlaps the slide content. In the sidebar, Width and Height are both 13.55 cm and Keep ratio is checked.
action_after_effects: The Height field becomes active for editing while the slide content stays the same.
steps.nl_explanation: Click the Height field to prepare to change the selected image size.

action_preconditions: The Height field is active in the right sidebar and currently contains `13.55 cm`.
steps.action_before_state: The selected image remains on the slide, and the Height box is focused in the Position and Size section.
action_after_effects: The full height value in the input box is highlighted, ready to be overwritten.
steps.nl_explanation: Press Ctrl+A to select the current height value in the focused field.

steps.step_goal: Replace the height with a new value
action_preconditions: The Height field is focused and its existing value is selected.
steps.action_before_state: The Height input is highlighted, indicating the current size value will be replaced by typed text.
action_after_effects: The Height field now contains `1`, but the image on the slide has not visibly resized yet because the value has not been committed.
steps.nl_explanation: Type `1` to enter a smaller height for the selected image.

action_preconditions: The Height field contains the new value `1`, and the image is still selected.
steps.action_before_state: The image properties panel shows the edited height value waiting to be applied, with Keep ratio still enabled.
action_after_effects: The image is resized and shrinks to a small square near the title area. The size field updates to 1.00 cm, with the proportions preserved.
steps.nl_explanation: Press Enter to apply the new height value and resize the selected image.

action_preconditions: The edited second slide is visible with the resized image still selected.
steps.action_before_state: The "Marketing Strategies" slide now contains a small inserted image near the title, and the sidebar still shows image properties.
action_after_effects: The presentation is saved. No visible layout change appears in the screenshot after the shortcut.
steps.nl_explanation: Press Ctrl+S to save the presentation after resizing the inserted image.
